subcodes.first_line: O thou who art assured in the Beauty of the Promised One! Thy noble brother hath attained unto the circle of the near ones, and thy revered father dwelleth in the precincts of mercy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای موقن بجمال موعود جناب اخوی بمطاف ملا مقربین فائز و جناب ابوی در جوار رحمه
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @eulogies; reminiscences, @firmness in the Covenant
